introSection: Steel Dolphin is a steel launched roller coaster located at Shanghai Haichang Ocean Park in Shanghai, China. It was manufactured by Intamin and opened on 17 November 2018.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Steel Dolphin is an LSM Launch Coaster manufactured by Intamin. The ride features two LSM launches and a tunnel.

fullText:
Steel Dolphin is a steel launched roller coaster located at Shanghai Haichang Ocean Park in Shanghai, China. It was manufactured by Intamin and opened on 17 November 2018.

Steel Dolphin is an LSM Launch Coaster manufactured by Intamin. The ride features two LSM launches and a tunnel.
